task_completion.description: Verify the built-in node is configured with exactly 1 executor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Jenkins node configuration page for the built-in node (controller). The 'Number of executors' field should be set to '1'.

task_completion.description: Verify the built-in node is configured with the correct labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Jenkins node configuration page, the 'Labels' field should contain both 'controller' and 'lightweight'.

task_completion.description: Verify the built-in node usage mode is set to exclusive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Jenkins node configuration page, the 'Usage' dropdown should be set to 'Only build jobs with label expressions matching this node'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Freestyle project named 'controller-health-check' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Jenkins job configuration page, dashboard, or breadcrumb indicating a Freestyle project named 'controller-health-check' exists.

task_completion.description: Verify the job is restricted to run only on the 'controller' label.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the job configuration page for 'controller-health-check', the checkbox 'Restrict where this project can be run' must be checked, and the 'Label Expression' field must be set to 'controller'.

task_completion.description: Verify the job has an Execute shell build step with the correct health check command.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the job configuration page, under the 'Build' or 'Build Steps' section, there should be an 'Execute shell' block containing the command: echo "Health check running on controller node" && hostname && date && uptime.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Jenkins web interface to perform the configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jenkins web UI (dashboard, node configuration, job configuration pages) rather than terminal windows using curl/API commands or Groovy scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs (labels, shell commands) must be entered into the actual Jenkins form fields, not a notepad, text editor, or browser address bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually applied or attempted to save the configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of clicking 'Save' or 'Apply' on the configuration pages, or subsequent screens showing the saved state of the node and the new job.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The built-in node (controller) must have exactly 1 executor, labels 'controller' and 'lightweight', and usage mode set to 'Only build jobs with label expressions matching this node' (EXCLUSIVE mode). A Freestyle project named 'controller-health-check' must be created, restricted to the 'controller' label, and include an 'Execute shell' build step with a command containing 'health check' and 'hostname' (specifically: echo "Health check running on controller node" && hostname && date && uptime).
